channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Emeka Ike’s N10bn suit: Voter information not confidential, INEC tells court
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
INEC tells court voter information is not confidential in Emeka Ike’s N10bn suit, citing Electoral Act 2026 provisions for public access.
Read More: https://punchng.com/emeka-ikes-n10bn-suit-voter-information-not-confidential-inec-tells-court/

item.title: Gunmen kill vigilante commander, three women in Rivers
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Gunmen suspected to be cultists killed a vigilante commander and three women in Omoku, Rivers State. Police condemn the attack and seek public information.
Read More: https://punchng.com/gunmen-kill-vigilante-commander-three-women-in-rivers/

item.title: ICPC uncovers 908 ghost workers, police top list
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The ICPC has uncovered 908 ghost workers across federal ministries and agencies, recovering N942m. The Nigeria Police Force tops the list of institutions a
Read More: https://punchng.com/icpc-uncovers-908-ghost-workers-police-top-list/

item.title: FULL LIST: Biggest records broken at 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Discover the biggest records broken at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, including Mbappé’s historic goalscoring and the highest goals-per-game average in decades.

item.title: Ondo senator celebrates Akeredolu’s posthumous birthday

item.description:
Ondo Senator Adeniyi Adegbomire celebrates Rotimi Akeredolu’s posthumous 70th birthday, highlighting his legacies in governance and security, including Amo

item.title: NSCDC secures life imprisonment for sexual offender in Kwara
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The NSCDC Kwara Command secured life imprisonment for a sexual offender, handling over 100 gender-related cases in H1 2026. Report cases for justice.

item.title: ‘War is over’ — Fubara declares support for Tinubu, Wike’s Rainbow Coalition
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The governor said the prolonged political crisis in the state had come to an end, urging his supporters to unite behind all candidates presented by the coalition. item.title: ‘Misleading’ – Shehu Sani Dismisses Claims Abacha Died Of Cardiac Arrest During Intercourse
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Former Kaduna Central Senator, Shehu Sani, has dismissed an account of the circumstances surrounding the death of former military Head of State, Sani Abacha. Sani maintained that the latest reports on the circumstances around Abacha’s death are misleading and should be ignored. Posting on X, he wrot

item.title: Fubara endorses Rivers APC guber candidate, joins Wike’s Rainbow Coalition
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Rivers State Governor Siminalayi Fubara has declared his support for the All Progressives Congress, APC, governorship candidate in the state, Kingsley Chinda. Fubara also endorsed President Bola Tinubu for a second term in office. The governor equally announced that he has joined the Rainbow Coaliti

item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) has uncovered what it described as a major payroll fraud involving hundreds of alleged fake workers across Federal Government ministries, departments and agencies (MDAs). According to a report by the BBC Pidgin, the commi

item.title: Experts call for urgent climate action as Africa faces growing disaster risks
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Climate experts have warned that Africa remains ill-prepared for increasingly frequent and devastating climate disasters, calling for urgent investment in resilient infrastructure, stronger regional cooperation and dedicated funding to protect vulnerable communities. Speaking at the 6th School of En

item.title: Akida Hills to Transform Jabi Lake Waterfront into Landmark Leisure and Tourism Destination
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: Abuja is set to welcome a landmark new waterfront destination as Akida Hills embarks on the development of a major leisure and tourism hub at Jabi Lake. Anchored by a first-of-its-kind dancing musical fountain in West Africa and a range of immersive attractions, the destination is expected to redefi

item.title: Tuggar Supporters Accept Bauchi APC Primary Outcome, Shift Allegiance To M.A Abubakar
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A group of members who identified themselves as supporters of former Minister of Foreign Affairs, Amb. Yusuf Maitama Tuggar, has declared support for the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship candidate in Bauchi State, Mohammed Abdullahi Abubakar SAN, ahead of the 2027 general election

item.description: The All Progressives Congress, APC, has dismissed African Democratic Congress, ADC, presidential candidate, Atiku Abubakar’s allegation that the 2026 Service-Wide Vote, SWV, was set aside to fund President Bola Tinubu’s 2027 re-election campaign. The APC, in a statement signed by its National Public

item.title: Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya Becomes First Woman Elected President of the Nigerian Bar Association
item.dc:creator: BellaNaija
item.description: Senior Advocate of Nigeria Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya has made history as the first woman directly elected to lead the Nigerian Bar Association, emerging as its 33rd president after polling over 12,000 votes. The post Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya Becomes First Woman Elected President of the Nigerian

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Federal Government has announced the commencement of the construction of a 1.5MW interconnected solar energy mini-grid in Pankshin, Plateau State. This was disclosed in a statement by the Rural Electrification Agency, REA, on Tuesday. Commenting on the 1.5MW mini-grid electricity initiative

item.title: Paredes should not be suspended - Spain's Gavi
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Spain midfielder Gavi says he does not think Argentina's Leandro Paredes should be suspended for his part in the confrontation after the World Cup final.

item.title: M-KOPA Hits 10 Million Customers across 5 Markets
item.dc:creator: TechEconomy
item.description: After reaching 1 million customers in 2020, M-KOPA has accelerated to add 9 million more, now adding 10,000 new customers daily M-KOPA, the pan-African fintech, has reached 10 million customers across its 5 African markets. From its first solar sale in 2012, reaching 1 million customers took 8 years

item.title: Father, 15-year-old daughter die after falling into Kano well
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A rescue operation by the Kano State Fire Service ended in tragedy after a father and his 15-year-old daughter were recovered dead from an old dry well in Yancibi Village, Tsanyawa Local Government Area of Kano State. The victims, identified as Abubakar Abdullahi, 45, and his daughter, Fiddausi Abub

item.description: Lewis Hamilton says Ferrari must "come and fight for the win" at this weekend's Hungarian Grand Prix while McLaren boss Andrea Stella expects the Scuderia to be "extremely competitive".

item.title: The Iran war has cost the US $37.5 billion dollars, says Defense Secretary Pete Hesgseth
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told a Senate committee that the Pentagon needs nearly 70 billion dollars in additional funding for the war in Iran. The hearing turned combative as Senators demanded explanations as to the military's strategy to win or otherwise end the war. Story by Bryan Quinn.

item.title: Man City’s Foden signs four-year contract extension
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Manchester City forward Phil Foden gave a boost to new boss Enzo Maresca by signing a four-year contract extension on Wednesday. The post Man City’s Foden signs four-year contract extension appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: NIN-SIM block disconnects: How to rescue your barred MTN line in 5 minutes
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Having your MTN line suddenly barred can be frustrating, especially if you rely on it for calls, banking transactions, or receiving one-time passwords (OTPs).... The post NIN-SIM block disconnects: How to rescue your barred MTN line in 5 minutes appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Sperm whales change ‘vowel’ sounds when boats are nearby, scientists discover
item.dc:creator: The Guardian
item.description: Researchers listening off the Caribbean island of Dominica found variations in the mammals’ audible clicks when marine traffic was closeSperm whales produce a specific pattern of clicking noises when they hear the noise of boats, researchers have found. The pattern is so distinct that the scientists

item.title: WhatsApp adds Apple CarPlay and Android Auto upgrades, iPad sign-ups, and more
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: WhatsApp on Apple CarPlay and Android Auto will let users hear and reply to messages, make calls, view their call history, and access favorite contacts hands-free and right from their car's screen.

item.title: Samsung’s newest foldable finally feels Ultra
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: While we wait for Apple's rumored foldable iPhone, Samsung is polishing a design it already has on the market. I just spent three hours with my hands on the new Z Fold 8 Ultra, and all I can think about is how Samsung finally made the crease invisible. Samsung says it achieved this thanks to [&#8230

item.title: Samsung’s wider Z Fold 8 feels just right
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: A year after overhauling its Z Fold phone with a radically thinner design, Samsung has changed things up again, this time altering the shape entirely. The Z Fold 8 is wider than any of Samsung's previous foldables, and shorter too, a size and shape somewhere between Samsung's traditional Flip and Fo

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 bet big on battery
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: It's a year of refinement for the Galaxy Watch. With the new Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, which are being announced today, Samsung is more or less taking what people like about its watches and tweaking those elements to be better. The company has been doing this for the past few generati

item.title: I almost forgot Samsung’s Z Flip 8 was a foldable
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Samsung's new Galaxy Z Flip 8 feels more like a regular phone than ever. It's thinner, lighter, and has a front screen you can do just about anything on. Whether that's a good or bad thing, I'm not quite sure yet. I spent three hours with Samsung's newest flip phone last week, and it doesn't [&#8230

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked 2026: The 6 biggest announcements
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Samsung's annual summer event kicked off on Wednesday morning with the company unveiling a new lineup of watches and foldables. Following weeks of rumors and leaks, Samsung announced the Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a completely new design that's shorter and wider than last year's Fold, a new "Ultra" Fold,

item.title: 'This means everything to me' - Foden signs new Man City contract
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Man City have announced Phil Foden has signed a new contract at the club.

item.title: Police Top List As ICPC Uncovers 908 Suspected Ghost Workers, Recovers N942m
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force recorded the highest number of suspected ghost workers uncovered by the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC), accounting for 570 of the 908 fake employees identified across federal Ministries, Departments and Agencies (MDAs) in a nationw
